name: coc-keeper
description: Call of Cthulhu Keeper mode with canonical skills, deterministic rules, transactional campaign state, and auditable play evidence.
author: Leehow
skillInstructions: This plugin is the canonical COC Keeper product. On explicit COC activation, load coc-main, coc-keeper-play, and coc-story-director from this plugin's skills tree. Do not use a thin user-skill copy or recreate rules/state/narration logic. Kimi has no verified native image-generation capability, so skip investigator portraits and continue character creation.
